new_constraint_from_v47: Primitive word is meaningful because Q/B/L semantics are fixed by canon; still requires retained q, theta, rank, axis/latch state.
Decimal/octal/binary string is not enough unless digit-order and line-symbol carrier convention are retained.
Ordinal adjacency is not state-complete; retained six-line carrier plus operation family R/C/RC is required.
Diagnostic/output channels are not the state; module/callback registry and full field variables are retained transition carrier.
Scalar Hall readout is not enough; retained branch register and field-order action are required.
For arbitrary branch surfaces, operator_word alone can collide; generator registry is first-class retained carrier data.
